name: Gem-Knight Lady Rose Diamond
name_jp: ジェムナイトレディ・ローズ・ダイヤ
desc:
1 "Gem-Knight" monster + 1 Fairy monster
Once per opponent's turn, the first time a "Gem-Knight" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, it is not destroyed. During your turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Gem-Knight" card from your GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy it.
mnst_eff:

During your turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Gem-Knight" card from your GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy it.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
